text: Entering this space, I feel an odd tension between sterility and creativity. The glass walls present both a barrier and an invitation—am I a visitor or a specimen? Once inside, the R+D wall surrounds me with a sense of curiosity and anticipation. I sense the presence of ideas buzzing through the air, the promise of innovation intertwined with surveillance. There is excitement, but also an undercurrent of self-consciousness, as if my thoughts are under observation, part of the experiment.
